'''Varnier''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who controlled the [[Wyloff sector/Legends|Wyloff sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was less concerned about government than recreation, and spent much of his time away from the actual leadership of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]].
